scripts.build: npm run build -w web && npm run build -w server
scripts.desktop: node desktop/scripts/patch-electron-name.mjs && npm run build && npm run build -w @z-wiki/desktop && electron desktop
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p web/tsconfig.app.json --noEmit && tsc -p scripts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p desktop/tsconfig.json --noEmit
